product_updates.title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei calls OpenAI’s messaging around military deal ‘straight up lies,’ report says
product_updates.content: Anthropic gave up its contract with the Pentagon over AI safety disagreements -- then, OpenAI swooped in.

product_updates.title: Apple Music to add Transparency Tags to distinguish AI music, says report
product_updates.content: The label or distributor has to opt in to tagging their music as AI, so it's unclear how effective this intervention will be.

product_updates.title: Google Search rolls out Gemini’s Canvas in AI Mode to all US users
product_updates.content: Canvas in AI Mode is available to U.S. users in English for creating plans, projects, apps, and more.

product_updates.title: Decagon completes first tender offer at $4.5B valuation
product_updates.content: The AI-powered customer support startup is the latest example of a fast-growing, young company that's providing employee liquidity.

product_updates.title: The US military is still using Claude — but defense-tech clients are fleeing
product_updates.content: As the U.S. continues its aerial attack on Iran, Anthropic models are being used for many targeting decisions.

product_updates.title: Father sues Google, claiming Gemini chatbot drove son into fatal delusion
product_updates.content: A father is suing Google and Alphabet, alleging its Gemini chatbot reinforced his son’s delusional belief it was his AI wife and coached him toward suicide and a planned airport attack.

product_updates.title: One startup’s pitch to provide more reliable AI answers: Crowdsource the chatbots
product_updates.content: CollectivIQ looks to give users more accurate answers to their AI queries by showing them responses that pull information from ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Grok — and up to 10 other models — all at the same time.

product_updates.title: Who needs data centers in space when they can float offshore?
product_updates.content: Offshore wind developer Aikido will deploy a small data center beneath a floating offshore wind turbine later this year.

product_updates.title: Why AI startups are selling the same equity at two different prices
product_updates.content: Some AI founders are using a novel valuation mechanism to manufacture unicorn status.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Bridging the operational AI gap
technical_breakthroughs.content: The transformational potential of AI is already well established. Enterprise use cases are building momentum and organizations are transitioning from pilot projects to AI in production. Companies are no longer just talking about AI; they are redirecting budgets and resources to make it happen. Ma…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: Earth’s rumblings, and AI for strikes on Iran
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology.
